bio: Shakira is a Colombian singer-songwriter and multi-GRAMMY® award winner who has sold over 95 million records worldwide. She has received four GRAMMYs®, fifteen Latin GRAMMYs®, and numerous World Music, American Music, and Billboard Awards.
